  • Reference

Plot calculated fluxes

plot_calculated_fluxes.Rd

Visualize calculated fluxes with optional grouping.

Usage

plot_calculated_fluxes(
  slopes,
  group_cols = NULL,
  start_date = NULL,
  end_date = NULL,
  daily = FALSE
)

Arguments

slopes

Data frame containing calculated fluxes. Must include TIMESTAMP, MIU_VALVE, and gas columns (e.g., CH4, CO2, N2O).

group_cols

Optional character vector of grouping variables.

start_date

Optional start date

end_date

Optional end date

daily

Logical. Aggregate to daily mean?

Value

A plotly object
